HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CARSON SMITH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. CARSON SMITH HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
MINUTE ORDER RE: VACATING MARCH 27, 2008, ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS
